full_text:
Xu Zhi 許芝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Zhi (許芝). Minister of Wei. Recommended Guan Lu to Cao Cao. Later convinced Cao Pi to take the throne. Xu Zhi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
